name: agentlint
description: Explain effective Codex instructions and audit agent skills, plugins, and MCP authority without executing them.

interface.shortDescription: Audit effective agent instructions before they run
interface.longDescription: Trace AGENTS.md precedence and connect Codex plugins, skills, and MCP authority in a local, read-only audit.
defaultPrompt: Audit this repository with AgentLint and explain the effective policy.
Find conflicting AGENTS.md rules and unsafe MCP authority.
Generate a self-contained AgentLint HTML report.
